title: GSC-M
description: A roleplay modpack for a server that adds things like vanilla+, random mods or technology
body:
### **General Description**
An vanilla+/rpg style modpack made for a survival server (Nos Mandaron Pal Spawn), the modpack contains several vanilla and rpg style mods such as Ice and Fire, Terralith, Just Leveling, Weapon Master, Aquamirae, Tectonic, Artifacts, etc.

### **Recomendations**
+2GB Ram, Intel celeron UHD graphics 600 (10 chunks in game)
